claim_boundary: RECOVERY TOP-UP evidence only from a stronger-denominator local grid; failures remain in the denominator and the result does NOT promote interval_status, coverage_status, inference_ready, supported, REML, AI-REML, q2/q4 count covariance, high-q, bridge support, or public support. The original weak-denominator caveat remains documented in the caveat sidecars.
next_gate: Use this as recovery-only board evidence; run primary-cluster confirmation before public recovery wording. Intervals and coverage remain unsupported until a separate interval route is designed and validated.
